projects.title: E-Commerce Full-Stack Store
projects.excerpt: Pixel-perfect UI/UX focused dynamic store built with Next.js App Router, featuring server components and optimised data fetching.
projects.imageAlt: A modern e-commerce storefront with product grid, clean typography, and a warm neutral colour palette

projects.title: Physical AI Interactive Textbook
projects.excerpt: AI-powered interactive book with a RAG-chatbot (Gemini) and real-time Urdu translation support for multilingual learners.
projects.imageAlt: An AI-powered interactive digital textbook with a bilingual chat panel

projects.title: TaskFlow AI Chatbot
projects.excerpt: Full-stack PWA task manager with natural-language commands, Recharts analytics dashboard, and offline-first architecture.
projects.imageAlt: A full-stack task management dashboard with analytics charts and an AI command bar

projects.title: ATS Resume Builder
projects.excerpt: High-performance TypeScript-based generator for professional resume architecture, optimised for applicant tracking systems.
projects.imageAlt: A professional resume builder with template selection and live ATS-score preview
